message:
feat(concurrent): Implement CPython-compatible submodule APIs

Implement all concurrent submodules with full CPython compatibility:

futures/ (Python 3.2+):
- futures.zig: Main module with as_completed(), wait constants
- futures/_base.zig: CPythonFuture, CPythonExecutor, Waiter classes
- futures/thread.zig: CPythonThreadPoolExecutor with work queue
- futures/process.zig: CPythonProcessPoolExecutor with MPContext
- futures/interpreter.zig: InterpreterPoolExecutor (Python 3.13+)

interpreters/ (Python 3.12+):
- interpreters.zig: Interpreter class, Queue, module functions
- interpreters/_crossinterp.zig: CrossInterpreterData, Channel
- interpreters/_queues.zig: InterpreterQueue, FIFOLock

Key features:
- Thread-safe queues with condition variables
- Cross-interpreter data serialization
- Context manager support (__enter__/__exit__)
- DRY pattern: submodules re-export from parent

8 files, 2,441 insertions
